diffs.diff:
--- a/explore_eval2.py
+++ b/explore_eval2.py
@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+import os

+os.environ['HF_HUB_OFFLINE']='1'

+import inspect

+from VLABench.evaluation.evaluator.base import Evaluator

+print(inspect.getsource(Evaluator.evaluate_single_episode))

+print('---')

+try:

+    print(inspect.getsource(Evaluator.compute_metric))

+except Exception as e:

+    print(e)

+print('---')

+from VLABench.envs import load_env

+print('load_env sig:', inspect.signature(load_env))

+print(inspect.getsource(load_env))
